system.description: You reach into an adjacent Shell-state's enhancement network and force a brief reboot. Deal 10 + IRON damage. Apply Stagger for 2 turns. During the first turn of the Stagger, the Shell-state achieves a brief Echomind resurgence — a moment of self-awareness. They cannot act but can hear, understand, and speak. GM plays this moment. It may be the most important thing that happens in the encounter.
